item.title: ppogg / YOLOv5-Lite
item.description:
Desc: 🍅🍅🍅YOLOv5-Lite: lighter, faster and easier to deploy. Evolved from yolov5 and the size of model is only 930+kb (int8) and 1.7M (fp16). It can reach 10+ FPS on the Raspberry Pi 4B when the input size is 320×320~
Lang: Python
